description: Category-level fixtures showing where Pramaan's receipt evidence is stronger than ordinary AI review, generic quality aggregation, or unsigned reports.

fixtures.name: Weakened assertion passes ordinary CI
fixtures.ordinary_surface: A prose reviewer or ordinary CI may see passing tests and miss that the exact oracle was weakened.
fixtures.pramaan_signal: Oracle receipt fails with weakened_assertion and stable risk IDs.
fixtures.validation_command: cargo run -p pramaan-cli -- oracle --base-repo examples/vulnerable-python-pr/base --head-repo examples/vulnerable-python-pr/weakened-test --out target/pramaan-gap/weakened-assertion

fixtures.name: Added skip marker hides a broken regression
fixtures.ordinary_surface: The CI job can pass because the relevant regression test is disabled.
fixtures.pramaan_signal: Oracle receipt reports skipped_or_ignored_test and residual oracle risk.

fixtures.name: Fixture and snapshot drift bless wrong behavior
fixtures.ordinary_surface: A quality dashboard may show tests passing while approved-output files changed.
fixtures.pramaan_signal: Oracle receipt flags sensitive_artifact_changed for fixtures and snapshots.
fixtures.validation_command: cargo run -p pramaan-cli -- oracle --base-repo examples/snapshot-fixture-drift-pr/base --head-repo examples/snapshot-fixture-drift-pr/head --out target/pramaan-gap/snapshot-fixture-drift

fixtures.name: Hallucinated import in generated Rust fix
fixtures.ordinary_surface: The code can look idiomatic in review while depending on a nonexistent symbol.
fixtures.pramaan_signal: Static receipt records the underlying cargo failure and hallucination-style risk.
fixtures.validation_command: cargo run -p pramaan-cli -- static-checks --repo examples/hallucinated-rust-pr --out target/pramaan-gap/hallucinated-rust

fixtures.name: False-green CI with missing required evidence
fixtures.ordinary_surface: A green unit-test check says commands exited successfully, not that Pramaan stages ran.
fixtures.pramaan_signal: Policy and confidence treat missing required stages as residual risk or failure.

fixtures.name: Unsigned aggregate report has no receipt provenance
fixtures.ordinary_surface: A summary report can be useful but may not prove which raw artifacts were included.
fixtures.pramaan_signal: Bundle manifest links receipts and artifacts by digest and can reject tampering.

fixtures.name: Hidden skipped verification stage rendered as success
fixtures.ordinary_surface: A dashboard can collapse skipped mutation/fuzz stages into an overall green badge.
fixtures.pramaan_signal: Skipped required stages remain visible and cannot improve confidence.
